Withdrawal Settings: Your withdrawal request for order #%1 has been received.
Settings tal-irtirar: It-talba tiegħek ta' irtirar għall-ordni #%1 ġiet riċevuta.

Withdrawal Settings: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
The shop will contact you regarding the next steps (e.g. return of goods, refund).
Settings tal-irtirar: Il-ħanut se jikkuntattjak rigward il-passi li jmiss (pereż. ritorn tal-oġġetti, rimborż).

Withdrawal Settings: Please enter your order number and the email address used for the order to find your order.
Settings tal-irtirar: Jekk jogħġbok daħħal in-numru tal-ordni u l-indirizz tal-email użat għall-ordni.

Withdrawal Settings: By submitting the withdrawal, you declare that you wish to revoke the purchase contract for this order.
Settings tal-irtirar: Billi tibgħat l-irtirar, tiddikjara li tixtieq tirrevoka l-kuntratt tax-xiri għal din l-ordni.

Withdrawal Settings: A withdrawal request has already been submitted for this order.
Settings tal-irtirar: Talba ta' irtirar diġà ġiet mibgħuta għal din l-ordni.

Withdrawal Settings: The withdrawal period for this order has expired. The deadline was: %1
Settings tal-irtirar: Il-perjodu ta' irtirar għal din l-ordni skada. L-iskadenza kienet: %1

Withdrawal Settings: Are you sure you want to submit the withdrawal for this order? This action cannot be undone.
Settings tal-irtirar: Ċert li trid tibgħat l-irtirar għal din l-ordni? Din l-azzjoni ma tistax tiġi rrevokata.

Withdrawal Settings: The order could not be found.
Invalid form key. Please try again.
Settings tal-irtirar: Ċavetta tal-formola invalida. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' pprova.

Withdrawal Settings: The withdrawal function is currently not available.
Settings tal-irtirar: Il-funzjoni ta' irtirar mhijiex disponibbli bħalissa.

Withdrawal Settings: Please log in to submit a withdrawal.
Settings tal-irtirar: Jekk jogħġbok idħol biex tibgħat irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: You are not authorized to withdraw this order.
Settings tal-irtirar: M'intix awtorizzat biex tirtira din l-ordni.

Withdrawal Settings: You are not authorized to view this order.
Settings tal-irtirar: M'intix awtorizzat biex tara din l-ordni.

Withdrawal Settings: The provided email does not match the order.
A withdrawal request already exists for this order.
Settings tal-irtirar: Diġà teżisti talba ta' irtirar għal din l-ordni.

Withdrawal Settings: The withdrawal period for this order has expired.
Settings tal-irtirar: Il-perjodu ta' irtirar għal din l-ordni skada.
It-talba tiegħek ta' irtirar ġiet mibgħuta.

Withdrawal Settings: Unable to submit withdrawal request. Please try again.
Settings tal-irtirar: Ma setgħetx tiġi mibgħuta t-talba ta' irtirar. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' pprova.

Withdrawal Settings: Please enter both order number and email address.
Settings tal-irtirar: Jekk jogħġbok daħħal kemm in-numru tal-ordni kif ukoll l-indirizz tal-email.

Withdrawal Settings: No order found with the given order number and email address.
Settings tal-irtirar: L-ebda ordni ma nstabet bin-numru u l-indirizz tal-email mogħtija.

Withdrawal Settings: Enable or disable the withdrawal button functionality.
Settings tal-irtirar: Attiva jew iddiżattiva l-funzjonalità tal-buttuna ta' irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: Email address to receive withdrawal notifications. If empty, the general store email will be used.
Settings tal-irtirar: Indirizz tal-email biex tirċievi notifiki ta' irtirar. Jekk vojt, jintuża l-email ġenerali tal-ħanut.

Withdrawal Settings: Number of days after order placement during which withdrawal is allowed. Default: 14 days.
Settings tal-irtirar: Numru ta' ijiem wara li tintbagħat l-aħħar kunsinna parzjali li fihom huwa permess l-irtirar. Default: 14-il ġurnata.

Withdrawal Settings: This order has not been shipped yet. You may withdraw at any time until you receive the goods.
Settings tal-irtirar: Din l-ordni għadha ma ntbagħtitx. Tista' tirtira fi kwalunkwe ħin sakemm tirċievi l-oġġetti.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the customer after withdrawal request.
Settings tal-irtirar: Template tal-email mibgħuta lill-klijent wara t-talba ta' irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the shop owner after withdrawal request.
Settings tal-irtirar: Template tal-email mibgħuta lis-sid tal-ħanut wara t-talba ta' irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: We have received your withdrawal request for Order #%order_increment_id.
Settings tal-irtirar: Irċivejna t-talba tiegħek ta' irtirar għall-ordni #%order_increment_id.

Withdrawal Settings: Your withdrawal request has been registered successfully.
Settings tal-irtirar: It-talba tiegħek ta' irtirar ġiet irreġistrata b'suċċess.

Withdrawal Settings: The shop will process your withdrawal request and contact you regarding the next steps (e.g. return of goods, refund).
Settings tal-irtirar: Il-ħanut se jipproċessa t-talba tiegħek ta' irtirar u jikkuntattjak rigward il-passi li jmiss (pereż. ritorn, rimborż).

Withdrawal Settings: If you have any questions, please contact us.
Settings tal-irtirar: Jekk għandek mistoqsijiet, jekk jogħġbok ikkuntattjana.

Withdrawal Settings: A new withdrawal request has been submitted.
Settings tal-irtirar: Ġiet mibgħuta talba ġdida ta' irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: Please review this withdrawal request and take the necessary steps.
Settings tal-irtirar: Jekk jogħġbok irrevedi din it-talba ta' irtirar u ieħu l-passi meħtieġa.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal is only possible for orders with one of these statuses. Default: pending, processing, complete.
Settings tal-irtirar: L-irtirar huwa possibbli biss għal ordnijiet b'wieħed minn dawn l-istati. Default: pendenti, qed jiġi pproċessat, lest.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal is only possible for orders with one of these statuses.
Settings tal-irtirar: L-irtirar huwa possibbli biss għal ordnijiet b'wieħed minn dawn l-istati.

Withdrawal Settings: All items of this order have already been withdrawn.
Settings tal-irtirar: L-oġġetti kollha ta' din l-ordni diġà ġew irtiati.

Withdrawal Settings: Some items from this order have already been withdrawn. The items marked below are no longer available for withdrawal.
Settings tal-irtirar: Xi oġġetti ta' din l-ordni diġà ġew irtiati. L-oġġetti mmarkati hawn taħt m'humiex aktar disponibbli għall-irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: Select the items you wish to withdraw. You may withdraw individual items (partial withdrawal) or all items at once.
Settings tal-irtirar: Agħżel l-oġġetti li trid tirtira. Tista' tirtira oġġetti individwali (irtirar parzjali) jew l-oġġetti kollha fl-istess ħin.

Withdrawal Settings: Please select at least one item to withdraw.
One or more of the selected items have already been withdrawn and cannot be withdrawn again.
Settings tal-irtirar: Oġġett wieħed jew aktar mill-oġġetti magħżula diġà ġew irtirati u ma jistgħux jiġu rtirati mill-ġdid.

Withdrawal Settings: Partial withdrawal is not enabled. Please withdraw the entire order.
Settings tal-irtirar: L-irtirar parzjali mhux attivat. Irtira l-ordni kollha.

Withdrawal Settings: Partial withdrawal requested by customer on %1. Items: %2
Settings tal-irtirar: Irtirar parzjali mitlub mill-klijent fid-%1. Oġġetti: %2

Withdrawal Settings: Allow customers to withdraw individual items instead of the entire order.
Settings tal-irtirar: Jippermettu lill-klijenti jirtiraw oġġetti individwali minflok l-ordni kollha.

Withdrawal Settings: We have received your %withdrawal_type_label for Order #%order_increment_id.
No item details recorded for this withdrawal request.
Settings tal-irtirar: L-ebda dettalji ta' oġġetti ma ġew irreġistrati għal din it-talba ta' irtirar.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal request confirmed by the shop on %1.
Settings tal-irtirar: It-talba għall-irtirar ġiet ikkonfermata mill-ħanut fil-%1.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal request rejected by the shop on %1.
Settings tal-irtirar: It-talba għall-irtirar ġiet miċħuda mill-ħanut fil-%1.
